case_title: BORSIAN LARRY K. DBA BORSIAN CABINETS VS AUSTIN MICHAEL DBA SIENA PACIFIC INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,924.85 FILED BY BORSIAN LARRY K. DBA BORSIAN CABINETS AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN MICHAEL DBA SIENA PACIFIC INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,363.00 FILED BY AUSTIN MICHAEL DBA SIENA PACIFIC INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BORSIAN LARRY K. DBA BORSIAN CABINETS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
